description.value:
A clockwork rotary crossbow that fires razor discs rather than bolts. On full auto it can hit multiple nearby targets with a single trigger pull, making it ideal for crowd control.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged d4 (30/120), Slashing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged 2d4 (30/120), Reload free, Clockwork, Disarm, Keen, Steady
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged 2d4 (30/120), Reload free, Clockwork, Disarm, Keen, Steady â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkAs an action, choose a number of targets up to your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1) each within 10 ft of the first target. Make a single attack roll against all of them, dealing damage to each you hit.

rmeData.masterPerk: As an action, choose a number of targets up to your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1) each within 10 ft of the first target. Make a single attack roll against all of them, dealing damage to each you hit.
